creator: bsdkaffee@gmail.com
text:
- The rmconfig target fails to remove the config file for ports using the new
  options framework
- Fix is attached...seems to solve the problem for several ports I tested

How-To-Repeat: Try configuring options for a port using the new options framework e.g. 
audio/jack
#cd /usr/ports/audio/jack
#make config
Save options
# make rmconfig
===> No user-specified options configured for jackit-0.121.3_2
